## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type

<!-- Pick one. Drives release-please version bump via Conventional Commit prefix in the title. -->

- [ ] feat — new user-facing capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — maintenance, no user-facing change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — internal restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] ci — CI / tooling
- [ ] BREAKING — incompatible change (use `feat!:` or `fix!:` in commit and explain below)

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Include commands run, expected vs actual output. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint` clean
- [ ] `npm run test` clean
- [ ] `cdk synth` clean (if infra changed)
- [ ] Manually exercised the relevant workflow / runtime change

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs considered, things deliberately deferred, gotchas. -->
